case_title: SCHUTT, GREGG VS GROSVENOR BUS LINES et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SCHUTT, GREGG AS TO DEFENDANT GROSVENOR BUS LINES FU, CE QIANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHUTT, GREGG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GROSVENOR BUS LINES FU, CE QIANG $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $76.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $526.00, PROOF OF SEVICE WAIVED.
